info.description: API REST for LiveCart SaaS — live commerce order detection, cart consolidation, and integrations.
info.title: LiveCart API

post.description: Creates a new store with the given name and slug

get.description: Returns the store associated with the authenticated user

put.description: Updates the store associated with the authenticated user

get.description: Returns customers with filtering, pagination, and sorting
Returns aggregated statistics for all customers in the store
Returns a single customer by their platform user ID
Returns monthly revenue data for the current year
Returns main dashboard metrics (revenue, orders, products, lives)
Returns the top 5 best selling products
Returns live sessions with filtering, pagination, and sorting

post.description: Creates a live session for the current store

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for all live sessions in the store
Returns a single live session by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing live session by its UUID

get.description: Returns orders with filtering, pagination, and sorting

parameters.description: Search by customer handle or order ID
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for all orders in the store
Returns a single order by its UUID with items

patch.description: Updates order status and/or payment status

get.description: Returns products with filtering, pagination, and sorting

parameters.description: Filter by source (manual, bling, tiny, shopify)
parameters.name: externalSource

post.description: Creates a product for the current store. Keyword is auto-generated if not provided.

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for all products in the store
Returns a single product by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing product by its UUID

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile including store information

post.description: Creates a new user and store if not exists, or returns existing user. Call this after first sign-in.
Receives and processes Clerk webhook events for user sync

stock_value.description: sum of price * stock in cents

BearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format: Bearer <token>
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
